      Entries []ProtocolPlanEntry `json:"entries,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolPlanEntry struct {
      Content  string `json:"content,omitempty"`
      Status   string `json:"status,omitempty"`
      Priority string `json:"priority,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolToolCall struct {
      ID        string                    `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name      string                    `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Kind      string                    `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Title     string                    `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Status    string                    `json:"status,omitempty"`
      RawInput  map[string]any            `json:"raw_input,omitempty"`
      RawOutput map[string]any            `json:"raw_output,omitempty"`
      Content   []ProtocolToolCallContent `json:"content,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolToolCallContent struct {
      Type       string  `json:"type,omitempty"`
      Content    any     `json:"content,omitempty"`
      TerminalID string  `json:"terminalId,omitempty"`
      Path       string  `json:"path,omitempty"`
      OldText    *string `json:"oldText,omitempty"`
      NewText    string  `json:"newText,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolToolCallLocation struct {
      Path string `json:"path,omitempty"`
      Line *int   `json:"line,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolUpdate struct {
      SessionUpdate string                     `json:"sessionUpdate,omitempty"`
      Content       any                        `json:"content,omitempty"`
      MessageID     string                     `json:"messageId,omitempty"`
      ToolCallID    string                     `json:"toolCallId,omitempty"`
      Title         string                     `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Kind          string                     `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Status        string                     `json:"status,omitempty"`
      RawInput      map[string]any             `json:"rawInput,omitempty"`
      RawOutput     map[string]any             `json:"rawOutput,omitempty"`
      Locations     []ProtocolToolCallLocation `json:"locations,omitempty"`
      Entries       []ProtocolPlanEntry        `json:"entries,omitempty"`
      Meta          map[string]any             `json:"_meta,omitempty"`
  }
  type ProtocolUpdateType string
  type PutParticipantRequest struct {
      SessionRef SessionRef         `json:"session_ref"`
      Binding    ParticipantBinding `json:"binding"`
  }
  type PutParticipantWithEventRequest struct {
      SessionRef       SessionRef         `json:"session_ref"`
      ExpectedRevision *uint64            `json:"expected_revision,omitempty"`
      Binding          ParticipantBinding `json:"binding"`
      Event            *Event             `json:"event"`
  }
  type Reader interface {
      Session(context.Context, SessionRef) (Session, error)
      Events(context.Context, EventsRequest) ([]*Event, error)
  }
  type ReleaseSessionLeaseRequest struct {
      SessionRef            SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      LeaseID               string     `json:"lease_id,omitempty"`
      OwnerID               string     `json:"owner_id,omitempty"`
      ExpectedLeaseRevision uint64     `json:"expected_lease_revision,omitempty"`
  }
  type RemoveParticipantRequest struct {
      SessionRef    SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      ParticipantID string     `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type RemoveParticipantWithEventRequest struct {
      SessionRef       SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      ExpectedRevision *uint64    `json:"expected_revision,omitempty"`
      ParticipantID    string     `json:"participant_id,omitempty"`
      Event            *Event     `json:"event"`
  }
  type RevisionConflictError struct {
      SessionID string
      Expected  uint64
      Actual    uint64
  }
  type Service interface {
      Lifecycle
      Reader
      EventAppender
      ControllerBindingStore
      ParticipantBindingStore
      StateStore
  }
  type Session struct {
      SessionRef
      Revision     uint64               `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      CWD          string               `json:"cwd,omitempty"`
      Title        string               `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Metadata     map[string]any       `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      Controller   ControllerBinding    `json:"controller,omitempty"`
      Participants []ParticipantBinding `json:"participants,omitempty"`
      CreatedAt    time.Time            `json:"created_at,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt    time.Time            `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type SessionLease struct {
      SessionRef  SessionRef `json:"session_ref"`
      LeaseID     string     `json:"lease_id,omitempty"`
      OwnerID     string     `json:"owner_id,omitempty"`
      Revision    uint64     `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      AcquiredAt  time.Time  `json:"acquired_at,omitempty"`
      HeartbeatAt time.Time  `json:"heartbeat_at,omitempty"`
      ExpiresAt   time.Time  `json:"expires_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type SessionLeaseService interface {
      AcquireSessionLease(context.Context, AcquireSessionLeaseRequest) (SessionLease, error)
      HeartbeatSessionLease(context.Context, HeartbeatSessionLeaseRequest) (SessionLease, error)
      ReleaseSessionLease(context.Context, ReleaseSessionLeaseRequest) error
  }
  type SessionList struct {
      Sessions   []SessionSummary `json:"sessions,omitempty"`
      NextCursor string           `json:"next_cursor,omitempty"`
  }
  type SessionRef struct {
      AppName      string `json:"app_name,omitempty"`
      UserID       string `json:"user_id,omitempty"`
      SessionID    string `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      WorkspaceKey string `json:"workspace_key,omitempty"`
  }
  type SessionSummary struct {
      SessionRef
      CWD       string         `json:"cwd,omitempty"`
      Title     string         `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Metadata  map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt time.Time      `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type StartSessionRequest struct {
      AppName            string         `json:"app_name,omitempty"`
      UserID             string         `json:"user_id,omitempty"`
      Workspace          WorkspaceRef   `json:"workspace,omitempty"`
      PreferredSessionID string         `json:"preferred_session_id,omitempty"`
      Title              string         `json:"title,omitempty"`
      Metadata           map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
  }
  type StateReader interface {
      SnapshotState(context.Context, SessionRef) (map[string]any, error)
  }
  type StateStore interface {
      StateReader
      StateWriter
  }
  type StateWriter interface {
      ReplaceState(context.Context, SessionRef, map[string]any) error
      UpdateState(context.Context, SessionRef, func(map[string]any) (map[string]any, error)) error
  }
  type Store interface {
      GetOrCreate(context.Context, StartSessionRequest) (Session, error)
      Get(context.Context, SessionRef) (Session, error)
      List(context.Context, ListSessionsRequest) (SessionList, error)
      AppendEvent(context.Context, SessionRef, *Event) (*Event, error)
      Events(context.Context, EventsRequest) ([]*Event, error)
      BindController(context.Context, SessionRef, ControllerBinding) (Session, error)
      PutParticipant(context.Context, SessionRef, ParticipantBinding) (Session, error)
      RemoveParticipant(context.Context, SessionRef, string) (Session, error)
      SnapshotState(context.Context, SessionRef) (map[string]any, error)
      ReplaceState(context.Context, SessionRef, map[string]any) error
      UpdateState(context.Context, SessionRef, func(map[string]any) (map[string]any, error)) error
  }
  type ToolExecution struct {
      Schema        int                 `json:"schema"`
      Key           ExecutionKey        `json:"key"`
      Identity      string              `json:"identity"`
      Revision      uint64              `json:"revision"`
      ToolName      string              `json:"tool_name"`
      EffectClass   string              `json:"effect_class"`
      Status        ToolExecutionStatus `json:"status"`
      RecoveredFrom ToolExecutionStatus `json:"recovered_from,omitempty"`
      Input         json.RawMessage     `json:"input,omitempty"`
      Result        json.RawMessage     `json:"result,omitempty"`
      Error         string              `json:"error,omitempty"`
      Reason        string              `json:"reason,omitempty"`
      CreatedAt     time.Time           `json:"created_at"`
      UpdatedAt     time.Time           `json:"updated_at"`
  }
  type ToolExecutionStatus string
  type ToolExecutionTransitionError struct {
      Identity string
      From     ToolExecutionStatus
      To       ToolExecutionStatus
      Detail   string
  }
  type UsageSnapshot struct {
      PromptTokens        int `json:"prompt_tokens,omitempty"`
      CachedInputTokens   int `json:"cached_input_tokens,omitempty"`
      CompletionTokens    int `json:"completion_tokens,omitempty"`
      ReasoningTokens     int `json:"reasoning_tokens,omitempty"`
      TotalTokens         int `json:"total_tokens,omitempty"`
      ContextWindowTokens int `json:"context_window_tokens,omitempty"`
  }
  type Visibility string
  type WorkspaceRef struct {
      Key string `json:"key,omitempty"`
      CWD string `json:"cwd,omitempty"`
  }
  var (
      ErrSessionNotFound = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: session not found")
  
      ErrAmbiguousSession = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: ambiguous session")
  
      ErrInvalidSession = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: invalid session")
  
      ErrInvalidEvent = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: invalid event")
  
      ErrInvalidValue = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: invalid JSON-compatible value")
  
      ErrRevisionConflict = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: revision conflict")
  
      ErrEventConflict = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: event conflict")
  
      ErrUnsupportedLegacyFormat = errors.New("agent-sdk/session: unsupported legacy format")
  )

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/skill
  const (
      ResolveNotFound  ResolveStatus = "not_found"
      ResolveMatched   ResolveStatus = "matched"
      ResolveAmbiguous ResolveStatus = "ambiguous"
  )
  const (
      SourceRegular = "regular"
      SourcePlugin  = "plugin"
  )
  func (c Catalog) MatchingMetas(name string) []Meta
  func (c Catalog) Metas() []Meta
  func (c Catalog) NameLookup() map[string]string
  func (c Catalog) Resolve(name string) (Meta, ResolveStatus)
  func (c Catalog) ResolveBool(name string) (Meta, bool)
  func CloneDiscoverRequest(req DiscoverRequest) DiscoverRequest
  func ClonePluginBundles(in []PluginBundle) []PluginBundle
  func DisplayDetail(meta Meta) string
  func DisplayKind(meta Meta) string
  func DisplayName(meta Meta) string
  func MatchesName(meta Meta, name string) bool
  func NameAliases(meta Meta) []string
  func NewCatalog(metas []Meta) Catalog
  func RefFromMeta(meta Meta) Ref
  type Bundle struct {
      Meta    Meta
      Root    string
      Content string
  }
  type Catalog struct {
      // contains filtered or unexported fields
  }
  type DiscoverRequest struct {
      Dirs          []string
      WorkspaceDir  string
      PluginBundles []PluginBundle
  }
  type Discovery interface {
      Discover(context.Context, DiscoverRequest) ([]Meta, error)
  }
  type Loader interface {
      Load(context.Context, Ref) (Bundle, error)
  }
  type Meta struct {
      Name        string
      Description string
      Path        string
      Source      string
      PluginID    string
      Namespace   string
      LocalName   string
  }
  type PluginBundle struct {
      Plugin    string
      Namespace string
      Root      string
      Disabled  []string
      Enabled   bool
  }
  type Ref struct {
      Name      string
      Path      string
      Namespace string
      PluginID  string
      LocalName string
  }
  type ResolveStatus string

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/task
  const (
      KindCommand  Kind = "command"
      KindSubagent Kind = "subagent"
  )
  const (
      ResultPersistenceCanonical ResultPersistenceMode = iota
  
      ResultPersistenceDeferred
  )
  const (
      StateRunning         State = "running"
      StateWaitingInput    State = "waiting_input"
      StateCompleted       State = "completed"
      StateFailed          State = "failed"
      StateCancelled       State = "cancelled"
      StateInterrupted     State = "interrupted"
      StateTerminated      State = "terminated"
      StateWaitingApproval State = "waiting_approval"
  )
  func (e *LeaseConflictError) Error() string
  func (e *RevisionConflictError) Error() string
  func CloneEntry(in *Entry) *Entry
  func CloneLease(in Lease) Lease
  func CloneRef(in Ref) Ref
  func CloneSnapshot(in Snapshot) Snapshot
  func NormalizeHandle(value string) string
  func SanitizeEntryForPersistence(entry *Entry, mode ResultPersistenceMode) *Entry
  func SanitizeResultForPersistence(result map[string]any, mode ResultPersistenceMode) map[string]any
  func TransientResultKeys() []string
  type AcquireLeaseRequest struct {
      TaskID               string        `json:"task_id"`
      OwnerID              string        `json:"owner_id"`
      LeaseID              string        `json:"lease_id"`
      ExpectedTaskRevision uint64        `json:"expected_task_revision"`
      Now                  time.Time     `json:"now"`
      TTL                  time.Duration `json:"ttl"`
  }
  type CASStore interface {
      Put(context.Context, PutRequest) (*Entry, error)
  }
  type CommandStartRequest struct {
      Command     string        `json:"command,omitempty"`
      Workdir     string        `json:"workdir,omitempty"`
      Yield       time.Duration `json:"yield,omitempty"`
      Timeout     time.Duration `json:"timeout,omitempty"`
      ParentCall  string        `json:"parent_call,omitempty"`
      ParentTool  string        `json:"parent_tool,omitempty"`
      Constraints any           `json:"-"`
      Observer    Observer      `json:"-"`
  }
  type ControlRequest struct {
      TaskID         string        `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      Yield          time.Duration `json:"yield,omitempty"`
      Input          string        `json:"input,omitempty"`
      Source         string        `json:"source,omitempty"`
      ContextPrelude string        `json:"context_prelude,omitempty"`
  }
  type Entry struct {
      TaskID         string              `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      Revision       uint64              `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      Kind           Kind                `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Session        session.SessionRef  `json:"session,omitempty"`
      Title          string              `json:"title,omitempty"`
      State          State               `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Running        bool                `json:"running,omitempty"`
      SupportsInput  bool                `json:"supports_input,omitempty"`
      SupportsCancel bool                `json:"supports_cancel,omitempty"`
      CreatedAt      time.Time           `json:"created_at,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt      time.Time           `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
      Lease          Lease               `json:"lease,omitempty"`
      StdoutCursor   int64               `json:"stdout_cursor,omitempty"`
      StderrCursor   int64               `json:"stderr_cursor,omitempty"`
      EventCursor    int64               `json:"event_cursor,omitempty"`
      Spec           map[string]any      `json:"spec,omitempty"`
      Result         map[string]any      `json:"result,omitempty"`
      Metadata       map[string]any      `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      Terminal       sandbox.TerminalRef `json:"terminal,omitempty"`
  }
  type HeartbeatLeaseRequest struct {
      TaskID                string        `json:"task_id"`
      OwnerID               string        `json:"owner_id"`
      LeaseID               string        `json:"lease_id"`
      ExpectedTaskRevision  uint64        `json:"expected_task_revision"`
      ExpectedLeaseRevision uint64        `json:"expected_lease_revision"`
      Now                   time.Time     `json:"now"`
      TTL                   time.Duration `json:"ttl"`
  }
  type Kind string
  type Lease struct {
      ID          string    `json:"id,omitempty"`
      OwnerID     string    `json:"owner_id,omitempty"`
      Revision    uint64    `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      AcquiredAt  time.Time `json:"acquired_at,omitempty"`
      HeartbeatAt time.Time `json:"heartbeat_at,omitempty"`
      ExpiresAt   time.Time `json:"expires_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type LeaseConflictError struct {
      TaskID string
      Detail string
  }
  type LeaseStore interface {
      AcquireLease(context.Context, AcquireLeaseRequest) (*Entry, error)
      HeartbeatLease(context.Context, HeartbeatLeaseRequest) (*Entry, error)
      ReleaseLease(context.Context, ReleaseLeaseRequest) (*Entry, error)
  }
  type Manager interface {
      StartCommand(context.Context, CommandStartRequest) (Snapshot, error)
      Wait(context.Context, ControlRequest) (Snapshot, error)
      Write(context.Context, ControlRequest) (Snapshot, error)
      Cancel(context.Context, ControlRequest) (Snapshot, error)
  }
  type Observer interface {
      ObserveTaskSnapshot(Snapshot)
  }
  type PutRequest struct {
      Entry            *Entry `json:"entry"`
      ExpectedRevision uint64 `json:"expected_revision"`
  }
  type Ref struct {
      TaskID     string `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      SessionID  string `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      TerminalID string `json:"terminal_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type ReleaseLeaseRequest struct {
      TaskID                string `json:"task_id"`
      OwnerID               string `json:"owner_id"`
      LeaseID               string `json:"lease_id"`
      ExpectedTaskRevision  uint64 `json:"expected_task_revision"`
      ExpectedLeaseRevision uint64 `json:"expected_lease_revision"`
  }
  type ResultPersistenceMode int
  type RevisionConflictError struct {
      TaskID   string
      Expected uint64
      Actual   uint64
  }
  type Snapshot struct {
      Ref            Ref                 `json:"ref,omitempty"`
      Revision       uint64              `json:"revision,omitempty"`
      Kind           Kind                `json:"kind,omitempty"`
      Title          string              `json:"title,omitempty"`
      State          State               `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Running        bool                `json:"running,omitempty"`
      SupportsInput  bool                `json:"supports_input,omitempty"`
      SupportsCancel bool                `json:"supports_cancel,omitempty"`
      CreatedAt      time.Time           `json:"created_at,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt      time.Time           `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
      Lease          Lease               `json:"lease,omitempty"`
      StdoutCursor   int64               `json:"stdout_cursor,omitempty"`
      StderrCursor   int64               `json:"stderr_cursor,omitempty"`
      EventCursor    int64               `json:"event_cursor,omitempty"`
      Result         map[string]any      `json:"result,omitempty"`
      Metadata       map[string]any      `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      Terminal       sandbox.TerminalRef `json:"terminal,omitempty"`
  }
  type State string
  type Store interface {
      Upsert(context.Context, *Entry) error
      Get(context.Context, string) (*Entry, error)
      ListSession(context.Context, session.SessionRef) ([]*Entry, error)
      GetSessionTaskByHandle(context.Context, session.SessionRef, Kind, string) (*Entry, error)
  }
  type SubagentStartRequest struct {
      Agent          string                          `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Prompt         string                          `json:"prompt,omitempty"`
      ContextPrelude string                          `json:"context_prelude,omitempty"`
      ParentCall     string                          `json:"parent_call,omitempty"`
      ParentTool     string                          `json:"parent_tool,omitempty"`
      Source         string                          `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Mode           string                          `json:"mode,omitempty"`
      ApprovalMode   string                          `json:"approval_mode,omitempty"`
      Approval       agent.SubagentApprovalRequester `json:"-"`
  }

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/task/delegation
  const (
      StateRunning         State = "running"
      StateCompleted       State = "completed"
      StateFailed          State = "failed"
      StateCancelled       State = "cancelled"
      StateInterrupted     State = "interrupted"
      StateWaitingApproval State = "waiting_approval"
  )
  func CloneAnchor(in Anchor) Anchor
  func CloneContinueRequest(in ContinueRequest) ContinueRequest
  func CloneRequest(in Request) Request
  func CloneResult(in Result) Result
  func NormalizeAgent(in Agent) Agent
  type Agent struct {
      Name        string `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Description string `json:"description,omitempty"`
  }
  type Anchor struct {
      TaskID    string `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      SessionID string `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      Agent     string `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      AgentID   string `json:"agent_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type ContinueRequest struct {
      Agent       string `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Prompt      string `json:"prompt,omitempty"`
      YieldTimeMS int    `json:"yield_time_ms,omitempty"`
  }
  type Request struct {
      Agent  string `json:"agent,omitempty"`
      Prompt string `json:"prompt,omitempty"`
  }
  type Result struct {
      TaskID        string    `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      State         State     `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Running       bool      `json:"running,omitempty"`
      Yielded       bool      `json:"yielded,omitempty"`
      OutputPreview string    `json:"output_preview,omitempty"`
      Result        string    `json:"result,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt     time.Time `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type State string

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/task/stream
  func CloneCursor(in Cursor) Cursor
  func CloneFrame(in Frame) Frame
  func CloneSnapshot(in Snapshot) Snapshot
  func NormalizeRef(in Ref) Ref
  type Controller interface {
      Service
      Wait(context.Context, Ref) (Snapshot, error)
      Kill(context.Context, Ref) error
      Release(context.Context, Ref) error
  }
  type Cursor struct {
      Output int64 `json:"output,omitempty"`
      Events int64 `json:"events,omitempty"`
  }
  type Frame struct {
      Ref       Ref            `json:"ref,omitempty"`
      Text      string         `json:"text,omitempty"`
      State     string         `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Cursor    Cursor         `json:"cursor,omitempty"`
      Running   bool           `json:"running,omitempty"`
      Closed    bool           `json:"closed,omitempty"`
      Event     *session.Event `json:"event,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt time.Time      `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type ReadRequest struct {
      Ref    Ref    `json:"ref,omitempty"`
      Cursor Cursor `json:"cursor,omitempty"`
  }
  type Ref struct {
      SessionID  string `json:"session_id,omitempty"`
      TaskID     string `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
      TerminalID string `json:"terminal_id,omitempty"`
  }
  type Service interface {
      Read(context.Context, ReadRequest) (Snapshot, error)
      Subscribe(context.Context, SubscribeRequest) iter.Seq2[*Frame, error]
  }
  type Sink interface {
      PublishStream(Frame)
  }
  type Snapshot struct {
      Ref           Ref       `json:"ref,omitempty"`
      Cursor        Cursor    `json:"cursor,omitempty"`
      Frames        []Frame   `json:"frames,omitempty"`
      FinalText     string    `json:"final_text,omitempty"`
      State         string    `json:"state,omitempty"`
      Running       bool      `json:"running,omitempty"`
      SupportsInput bool      `json:"supports_input,omitempty"`
      ExitCode      *int      `json:"exit_code,omitempty"`
      StartedAt     time.Time `json:"started_at,omitempty"`
      UpdatedAt     time.Time `json:"updated_at,omitempty"`
  }
  type SubscribeRequest struct {
      Ref          Ref           `json:"ref,omitempty"`
      Cursor       Cursor        `json:"cursor,omitempty"`
      PollInterval time.Duration `json:"poll_interval,omitempty"`
  }

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/task/subagent
  type ApprovalOption = agent.ApprovalOption
  type ApprovalRequest = agent.SubagentApprovalRequest
  type ApprovalRequester = agent.SubagentApprovalRequester
  type ApprovalResponse = agent.ApprovalResponse
  type ApprovalToolCall = agent.SubagentApprovalToolCall
  type Registry interface {
      Get(context.Context, string) (delegation.Agent, error)
      List(context.Context) ([]delegation.Agent, error)
  }
  type Runner interface {
      Spawn(context.Context, SpawnContext, delegation.Request) (delegation.Anchor, delegation.Result, error)
      Continue(context.Context, delegation.Anchor, delegation.ContinueRequest) (delegation.Result, error)
      Wait(context.Context, delegation.Anchor, int) (delegation.Result, error)
      Cancel(context.Context, delegation.Anchor) error
  }
  type SpawnContext = agent.SubagentSpawnContext

package github.com/caelis-labs/caelis/agent-sdk/tool
  const (
      CommandSandboxPermissionUseDefault       = "use_default"
      CommandSandboxPermissionRequireEscalated = "require_escalated"
      CommandSandboxPermissionLegacyAdditional = "with_additional_permissions"
  )
  const (
      EffectReadOnly      EffectClass = "read_only"
      EffectIdempotent    EffectClass = "idempotent"
      EffectNonIdempotent EffectClass = "non_idempotent"
  )
  const (
      ErrorCodeNotFound             ErrorCode = "not_found"
      ErrorCodePermissionDenied     ErrorCode = "permission_denied"
      ErrorCodeSandboxDenied        ErrorCode = "sandbox_denied"
      ErrorCodeSandboxUnavailable   ErrorCode = "sandbox_unavailable"
      ErrorCodeOldTextNotFound      ErrorCode = "old_text_not_found"
      ErrorCodeTooManyMatches       ErrorCode = "too_many_matches"
      ErrorCodeUnexpectedMatchCount ErrorCode = "unexpected_match_count"
      ErrorCodeStaleRevision        ErrorCode = "stale_revision"
      ErrorCodeTimeout              ErrorCode = "timeout"
      ErrorCodeOutputTruncated      ErrorCode = "output_truncated"
      ErrorCodeInvalidInput         ErrorCode = "invalid_input"
  )
  const (
      MetadataToolKind            = "caelis.tool.kind"
      MetadataPluginID            = "caelis.plugin.id"
      MetadataMCPServer           = "caelis.mcp.server"
      MetadataMCPTool             = "caelis.mcp.tool"
      MetadataDiscoveredToolNames = "caelis.tool.discovered_names"
      MetadataExecutionJournal    = "caelis.execution_journal"
  
      MetadataToolKindMCP        = "mcp"
      MetadataToolKindToolSearch = "tool_search"
  
      ToolSearchToolName = "tool_search"
  )
  const (
      RecoveryUnknown   RecoveryStatus = "unknown"
      RecoverySucceeded RecoveryStatus = "succeeded"
      RecoveryFailed    RecoveryStatus = "failed"
  )
  func (e *ToolError) Error() string
  func (e *ToolError) Unwrap() error
  func (p TruncationPolicy) ByteBudget() int
  func (p TruncationPolicy) TokenBudget() int
  func (r ToolSearchResult) DiscoveredToolNames() []string
  func (t NamedTool) Call(ctx context.Context, call Call) (Result, error)
  func (t NamedTool) Definition() Definition
  func (v *ToolVisibility) ApplyDiscoveredToolNames(names []string)
  func (v *ToolVisibility) ApplyToolResult(name string, output map[string]any)
  func (v *ToolVisibility) ApplyToolSearchOutput(output map[string]any)
  func (v *ToolVisibility) Reveal(name string)
  func (v ToolVisibility) ModelSpecs() []model.ToolSpec
  func AllModelSpecs(tools []Tool) []model.ToolSpec
  func CanonicalName(name string) string
  func CloneCall(in Call) Call
  func CloneDefinition(in Definition) Definition
  func CloneResult(in Result, err error) (Result, error)
  func CommandSandboxPermissionAllowedValues(allowLegacy bool) string
  func DefaultTruncationPolicy() TruncationPolicy
  func Definitions(tools []Tool) []Definition
  func DiscoveredToolNamesFromMetadata(meta map[string]any) []string
  func DiscoveredToolNamesMetadataValue(names []string) []string
  func EffectClassOf(def Definition) EffectClass
  func ErrorPayload(err error) map[string]any
  func IsMCPDefinition(def Definition) bool
  func IsToolSearchDefinition(def Definition) bool
  func ModelSpecs(tools []Tool) []model.ToolSpec
  func NewError(code ErrorCode, message string) *ToolError
  func NewToolSearchDiscoveredTool(def Definition) ToolSearchDiscoveredTool
  func NewToolSearchResult(definitions []Definition) ToolSearchResult
  func NewToolVisibility(tools []Tool) ToolVisibility
  func NormalizeCommandSandboxPermission(value string, allowLegacy bool) (string, error)
  func ParseToolSearchOutput(output map[string]any) ToolSearchResult
  func RejectUnknownArgs(args map[string]any, allowed ...string) error
  func RuntimeModel(call Call) (model.LLM, bool)
  func TruncateJSON(raw json.RawMessage, policy TruncationPolicy) (json.RawMessage, TruncationInfo)
  func TruncateMap(input map[string]any, policy TruncationPolicy) (map[string]any, TruncationInfo)
  func TruncateParts(parts []model.Part, policy TruncationPolicy) ([]model.Part, TruncationInfo)
  func TruncateResultWithInfo(result Result, policy TruncationPolicy) (Result, TruncationInfo)
  func TruncateString(s string, policy TruncationPolicy) (string, int)
  func TruncateText(s string, policy TruncationPolicy) (string, int)
  func TruncationMetadata(info TruncationInfo) map[string]any
  func WrapError(code ErrorCode, err error, message string) *ToolError
  type Call struct {
      ID           string          `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name         string          `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Input        json.RawMessage `json:"input,omitempty"`
      Metadata     map[string]any  `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      RuntimeModel model.LLM       `json:"-"`
      Observer     Observer        `json:"-"`
  }
  type Definition struct {
      Name        string         `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Description string         `json:"description,omitempty"`
      InputSchema map[string]any `json:"input_schema,omitempty"`
      Metadata    map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
      EffectClass EffectClass    `json:"effect_class,omitempty"`
  }
  type EffectClass string
  type ErrorCode string
  type NamedTool struct {
      Def    Definition
      Invoke func(context.Context, Call) (Result, error)
  }
  type Observer interface {
      ObserveToolResult(Result)
  }
  type Recoverer interface {
      Recover(context.Context, RecoveryRequest) (RecoveryResult, error)
  }
  type RecoveryRequest struct {
      ExecutionIdentity string `json:"execution_identity"`
      Call              Call   `json:"call"`
  }
  type RecoveryResult struct {
      Status RecoveryStatus `json:"status"`
      Result Result         `json:"result,omitempty"`
      Reason string         `json:"reason,omitempty"`
  }
  type RecoveryStatus string
  type Registry interface {
      List(context.Context) ([]Tool, error)
      Lookup(context.Context, string) (Tool, bool, error)
  }
  type Result struct {
      ID       string         `json:"id,omitempty"`
      Name     string         `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Content  []model.Part   `json:"content,omitempty"`
      Meta     map[string]any `json:"meta,omitempty"`
      IsError  bool           `json:"is_error,omitempty"`
      Metadata map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
  }
  type Tool interface {
      Definition() Definition
      Call(context.Context, Call) (Result, error)
  }
  type ToolError struct {
      Code      ErrorCode
      Message   string
      Hint      string
      Retryable bool
      Err       error
  }
  type ToolSearchDiscoveredTool struct {
      Type         string                      `json:"type"`
      Name         string                      `json:"name,omitempty"`
      Description  string                      `json:"description,omitempty"`
      Parameters   map[string]any              `json:"parameters,omitempty"`
      DeferLoading bool                        `json:"defer_loading,omitempty"`
      Source       map[string]any              `json:"source,omitempty"`
      Function     *ToolSearchFunctionContract `json:"function,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolSearchFunctionContract struct {
      Name string `json:"name,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolSearchResult struct {
      Tools []ToolSearchDiscoveredTool `json:"tools,omitempty"`
      Count int                        `json:"count,omitempty"`
  }
  type ToolVisibility struct {
      // contains filtered or unexported fields
  }
  type TruncationInfo struct {
      Truncated       bool
      Policy          string
      MaxTokens       int
      MaxBytes        int
      EstimatedTokens int
      EstimatedBytes  int
      RemovedTokens   int
      RemovedBytes    int
      OmittedItems    int
  }
  type TruncationPolicy struct {
      MaxTokens int
      MaxBytes  int
  }
